title: Kale Chimichurri
description: A fresh, garlicky blender sauce of kale, green herbs, olive oil, lime, nuts or seeds, and a punch of red pepper flakes.
yield: 1¼ cups (5 servings of ¼ cup each)

items: Juice of 2 limes (or ¼ cup white vinegar)
¼ cup cashews, sunflower seeds, or almonds

instructions: Blend all the sauce ingredients together in a small blender or food processor until mostly smooth.
Pour on everything and feel like a kale-loaded million bucks.

notes.text: Vegan and gluten-free with no adaptation needed. Not freezable. Keeps in the fridge about 5 days.
